When did Kikuyus start arranging, dis-arranging and rearranging Luyhas in their desperate move to take power back to Morima? When will Luyhas realize Sifuna is a stooge of Kikuyus to restore their ethnic domination in Kenya? We Luos are liberated - all communities are equal.

It is now clear that there is NOTHING @WilliamsRuto will ever do to please Kikuyus.Hawa wameenda Rais..... In Mt Kenya focus on Meru and Tharaka Nithi where @KindikiKithure holds considerable sway.Even in Embu I doubt if there is much we can do....infact they are more ruthless than their Kikuyu cousins. The few guys around you from central are in it for their own SELFISH reasons,at your hour of need they will bolt out and tell their people that," Ndovu hazikwi na Pembe zake!" Learn from what they did to Uhuru/Raila and focus on areas where you still have a chance,otherwise you run the risk of spreading yourself too thin and losing it all! Finally,in this era of technology and with our level of literacy let no one lie to you that you can rig yourself in or you can brutalize your way into second term!! RE-ORGANIZE YOUR GOVT ONE LAST TIME AND SORROUND YOURSELF WITH PEOPLE WHO MEAN WELL NOT OPPORTUNISTS WHO CAN NOT EVEN HOLD A PRESSER TO DEFEND YOUR PROGRAMS!!! At this point I pray that God grants you discernment to know your true friends and wisdom to deal with the facts as they come.
